title: 10 Day Trading Tips for Beginners Getting Started
author: Sigma Capital

excerpt: To start day trading, gain knowledge, use technical analysis, and manage risks. Start with a small amount of capital and practice with a few stocks. Set clear price targets and use stop-loss orders to control losses.

content.introduction: To start day trading, gain knowledge, use technical analysis, and manage risks. Start with a small amount of capital and practice with a few stocks. Set clear price targets and use stop-loss orders to control losses.
body: As a beginner, focus on a maximum of one to two stocks during a session. Tracking and finding opportunities is easier with just a few stocks.
